      Saves an entity (adds if ID is null, updates if ID exists).

    • Uses of UserContext in com.rays.dao.impl

      Methods in com.rays.dao.impl with parameters of type UserContext 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void UserDAOImpl.delete​(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Deletes a user and also deletes their associated profile picture to maintain data integrity.
      java.util.List<MarksheetDTO> MarksheetDAOImpl.getMeritList​(UserContext userContext)
      Retrieves the merit list of top 10 students based on total marks.
      void FacultyDAOImpl.populate​(FacultyDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Populates the faculty DTO with college, course, and subject names based on their respective IDs.
      void MarksheetDAOImpl.populate​(MarksheetDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Populates the marksheet DTO with student name based on student ID.
      void StudentDAOImpl.populate​(StudentDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Populates the student DTO with college name based on college ID.
      void SubjectDAOImpl.populate​(SubjectDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Populates the subject DTO with course name based on course ID.
      void TimetableDAOImpl.populate​(TimetableDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Populates the timetable DTO with subject and course names based on their respective IDs.
      void UserDAOImpl.populate​(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Populates the user DTO with role name and preserves existing last login and image ID information.

      Methods in com.rays.service with parameters of type UserContext 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      UserDTO UserServiceInt.changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String oldPassword, java.lang.String newPassword, UserContext userContext)
      Changes the user's password after validating the old password.
      UserDTO UserServiceInt.findByLoginId​(java.lang.String name, UserContext userContext)
      Finds a user by their login ID.

      Finds a marksheet by roll number.
      java.util.List<MarksheetDTO> MarksheetServiceInt.getMeritList​(UserContext userContext)
      Retrieves the merit list of top performing students.
      UserDTO UserServiceInt.register​(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Registers a new user account.
